title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: We have had a lurching politics of over-correction in both directions: government ministers are talking/thinking about how to reduce immigration further from net 170k when it is already heading towards zero and below ...
